name: GSR II Meteora Acquisition Corp. Warrant
summary: GSR II Meteora Acquisition Corp. Warrant entitles the holder to purchase shares of the company's common stock at a predetermined price, typically after a certain period following the company's initial public offering (IPO). The warrant's value is dependent on the performance of the underlying stock. The warrants were issued as part of units sold during the GSR II Meteora Acquisition Corp.'s IPO.
